Sign in
                Promote your website, products, and app to the right users with Google Ads.

      Stay organized with collections
    
      
      Save and categorize content based on your preferences.
    
    
        Google Ads
      
  
            Create and manage ads that reach users looking for your products or services on Google Search, Display, YouTube and more.
          
Get started on Google Ads
    
        Google Ads App Promotion
      
  
            Use Google Ads to drive installs, re-engagement, and lifetime value for your app.
          
Learn about app promotion
    
        Google Shopping
      
  
            List your products and make them available for online and local shoppers to find and buy.
          
Learn about Google Shopping
Content API for Shopping
    
        Google Ads API and Google Ads scripts
      
  
            Save time by automating your Google Ads campaign management. Build an application to interact directly with the Google Ads platform or write programmatic scripts.
          
Google Ads API
Google Ads Scripts
    
        Webhook
      
  
            Use webhook to send data from Google Ads to your CRM system.
          
Lead form Webhook

llm_raw.description: A comprehensive advertising platform for managing search, display, and video ad campaigns across Google's ecosystem.
llm_raw.notes: The Google Ads API is highly robust, supporting full campaign management, reporting, and automation, but has a steep learning curve and strict rate limiting.
